steps.code_example:
# Trim adapter sequences with cutadapt
cutadapt \
  -a AGATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCA \
  -A AGATCGGAAGAGCGTCGTGTAGGGAAAGAGTGT \
  -m 18 \
  -j 8 \
  -o trimmed_R1.fastq.gz \
  -p trimmed_R2.fastq.gz \
  sample_R1.fastq.gz sample_R2.fastq.gz

# Align RNA-seq reads with STAR
STAR \
  --runMode alignReads \
  --genomeDir /path/to/star_index \
  --readFilesIn sample_R1.fastq.gz sample_R2.fastq.gz \
  --readFilesCommand zcat \
  --runThreadN 8 \
  --outFileNamePrefix sample_ \
  --outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
  --quantMode GeneCounts \
  --outSAMattributes NH HI AS NM MD

steps.description: PCR duplicate removal and sorting with samtools
steps.code_example:
# Sort, index, and get stats with samtools
samtools sort -@ 8 -o sorted.bam input.bam
samtools index sorted.bam
samtools flagstat sorted.bam
samtools idxstats sorted.bam

# Filter mapped reads (MAPQ >= 20)
samtools view -b -q 20 -F 4 sorted.bam > filtered.bam

# Call CLIP-seq peaks with CLIPper (Yeo Lab)
clipper \
  --bam ip_sample.bam \
  --species hg38 \
  --outfile peaks.bed

# For eCLIP: compare IP vs input
# Then use overlap with size-matched input for normalization

# Merge replicate eCLIP peaks using IDR (Yeo Lab)
python merge_peaks.py \
  --ip_rep1 rep1_peaks.bed \
  --ip_rep2 rep2_peaks.bed \
  --input_rep1 input1_peaks.bed \
  --input_rep2 input2_peaks.bed \
  --output_file merged_peaks.bed
